<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk006.pdf#page=1 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p250 -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS BERCHTESGADEN · MARIA GERN -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS BERCHTESGADEN · MARIA GERN -->


[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img006.jpg|thumb|Kuppelgewölbe mit H Immaculata, D Anbetung der Könige, E Pfingsten und 7-14 Marienszenen (Christoph Lehrl und Franz Thomas Schmidt 1710/11]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p001_img007.jpg|thumb|1 Tod Josephs?, 3 Mariä Vermählung, 5 Traum Joseph]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p251 -->
